message:
test(bd-2z7s): cover remaining diagnostics.rs branches

Add 9 new tests for diagnostics covering: remaining categorize_error
protocol/handler codes, render_header for all categories, ResourceNotFound
suggestions, plain-mode error rendering with/without data, render_panic
without backtrace, plain-mode warning/info, ErrorCategory Debug/Clone,
render_error_panel without data, and render_error helper function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
